fato_historico: 1994: Rwandan genocide: The Rwandan Patriotic Front takes control of Gisenyi and north western Rwanda, forcing the interim government into Zaire and ending the genocide.
energia_do_dia: Much like the quiet hope that rises when long shadows finally break, today invites you to seek closure and fresh starts. Perhaps it is a good time to release heavy burdens from your heart. As you navigate your social spheres, consider that seeking justice and harmony can turn even the most difficult chapters into a beautiful new beginning.
frase_do_dia: Every ending creates space for a brand new story of light to unfold.
significado_numero: A powerful cycle of maturity, compassion, and the pursuit of ultimate truth.
conselho: Choose kindness and let go of what no longer serves your peaceful spirit.
